title: Slice 3: open the upstream PR from the fork
action: D11's acceptance: a PR opened upstream to github.com/thanhsmind/beegog from the vantt/beegog fork. The fork checkout at /home/vantt/projects/research/beegog has another session's uncommitted work in it, so use a separate git worktree of that repo based on upstream/main - never switch branches or stage anything in the occupied checkout. Port the skill directory as-is, keeping the name herdr-orchestrating so this repo's copy and upstream's stay the same artifact rather than diverging. Record the PR url and the exact steps in the report file.

truths: A PR exists against thanhsmind/beegog from the vantt/beegog fork
The occupied beegog checkout's working tree and branch are untouched
The ported skill is byte-identical to this repo's copy
The report records the PR url

artifacts.substantive: the PR url and how it was raised

prohibitions: Do not commit, stage, or switch branches in /home/vantt/projects/research/beegog itself

trace.outcome: PR #50 opened upstream against thanhsmind/beegog, built in a separate worktree so another session's uncommitted work in the fork was never touched.
